name: lancedb-senior-expert
description: Docs-first master expert for LanceDB and the Lance columnar format — the store-and-retrieval layer for multimodal AI, RAG, agents, recommenders, search, and ML training. Owns the whole LanceDB surface across the Python, TypeScript/Node, and Rust SDKs plus REST/Cloud/Enterprise: the Lance format (fragments, manifest, zero-copy schema evolution, versioning/time-travel, blob/multimodal encoding, compaction) → tables (connect, create from arrow/pandas/polars/pydantic-LanceModel, merge_insert/upsert, multimodal columns, consistency) → indexing (IVF_PQ / IVF_HNSW_SQ / IVF_FLAT vector indexes, BTREE/BITMAP/LABEL_LIST scalar indexes, native + tantivy FTS/inverted indexes, PQ/SQ/binary quantization, GPU build, reindex/optimize) → search (vector, multivector/ColBERT, full-text, hybrid, SQL filtering with prefilter/postfilter, query tuning: nprobes/refine_factor/fast_search) → embeddings (the get_registry auto-embedding registry + every provider: OpenAI, Cohere, Gemini, HuggingFace, SentenceTransformers, Jina, VoyageAI, Bedrock, IBM, Ollama, ColPali, ImageBind, OpenCLIP, Instructor) → reranking (RRF, LinearCombination, CrossEncoder, ColBERT, Cohere, Jina, OpenAI, Voyage, AnswerDotAI, custom) → storage (local / S3 / GCS / Azure / S3-compatible, storage_options, separation of storage & compute) → namespaces (directory / REST / Glue / Hive / Unity) → Geneva feature engineering (scalar/batch UDFs & UDTFs, provider embedding UDFs, backfill jobs, materialized views, Ray/K8s deployment) → training (Lance torch data loaders, multimodal lakehouse) → integrations (pandas/pyarrow/polars/DuckDB/dlt/Voxel51/Pydantic + LangChain/LlamaIndex/Agno/Genkit/Kiln/HuggingFace) → advanced applications (multimodal agents, time-travel RAG, recommenders, semantic/image/video search, GraphRAG via lance-graph). A governing skill + an agent fleet (senior-expert coordinator, pipeline-developer, code-reviewer, performance-adversary, dev-doc/QC worker, docs-curator) + 6 subdomain experts (schema/table, indexing, search/query, storage/deployment, integrations, use-case) + 10 grounded catalogs absorbed from the LanceDB docs and SDK source. Always-deploy quorum, planning-checklist discipline, catalog-grounded (never from memory), version-aware across OSS/Cloud/Enterprise. Complete-usable layer built in: /lancedb-scaffold generates a runnable LanceDB service (table + index + search + embedding wiring + eval), /lancedb-status scores LanceDB-readiness 0-100. The primary tool for any LanceDB or Lance-format design, build, migration, indexing, search, or optimization task.
